questions.fact: The 8th Poshan Pakhwada 2026 is being observed from 9 April to 23 April 2026 under Mission Poshan 2.0.
questions.question: Under which mission is Poshan Pakhwada 2026 being observed?
questions.explanation: PIB said the 8th Poshan Pakhwada 2026 is being observed from 9 April to 23 April 2026 under Mission Poshan 2.0.

source.title: National launch of 8th Poshan Pakhwada 2026

questions.fact: The 8th Poshan Pakhwada 2026 focuses on early childhood nutrition and development.
questions.question: What is the theme of the 8th Poshan Pakhwada 2026?
options: Maximizing Brain Development in the First Six Years of Life
questions.correct_answer: Maximizing Brain Development in the First Six Years of Life
questions.explanation: The official PIB release said the theme for the 8th Poshan Pakhwada is 'Maximizing Brain Development in the First Six Years of Life'.

source.title: National launch of 8th Poshan Pakhwada 2026

questions.fact: Pradhan Mantri MUDRA Yojana completed 11 years in April 2026.
questions.question: Pradhan Mantri MUDRA Yojana was launched in which year?
questions.explanation: The PIB background note on 11 years of PMMY states that the scheme was launched on 8 April 2015.

source.title: 11 Years of Pradhan Mantri MUDRA Yojana

questions.fact: PMMY is designed to expand credit access for small entrepreneurs.
questions.question: Which phrase is closely associated with Pradhan Mantri MUDRA Yojana?
questions.explanation: The PIB note on 11 years of PMMY describes the scheme as a step taken with the vision of 'Funding the Unfunded'.

source.title: 11 Years of Pradhan Mantri MUDRA Yojana

questions.fact: In the April 2026 monetary policy cycle, RBI kept the repo rate unchanged.
questions.question: In the April 2026 monetary policy review, RBI kept the policy repo rate unchanged at:
questions.explanation: The RBI rates page after the April 2026 policy cycle showed the policy repo rate at 5.25%.

source.title: Current Rates and Policy Snapshot

questions.fact: IMD's first-stage forecast said the 2026 southwest monsoon seasonal rainfall over India is likely to be below normal.
questions.question: According to IMD's first-stage long-range forecast for 2026, seasonal southwest monsoon rainfall over India is likely to be what percent of the Long Period Average?
questions.explanation: IMD's 13 April 2026 long-range forecast said seasonal rainfall for June to September 2026 is likely to be 92% of the Long Period Average, with a model error of plus or minus 5%.

source.title: Long Range Forecast For the 2026 Southwest Monsoon Season Rainfall

questions.fact: ISRO conducted the Second Integrated Air Drop Test (IADT-02) on 10 April 2026.
questions.question: ISRO's IADT-02 was conducted as part of readiness for which mission?
questions.explanation: ISRO said IADT-02 validated parachute-based deceleration systems and marked another step toward readiness for the Gaganyaan G1 mission.

source.title: ISRO conducts Second Integrated Air Drop Test (IADT-02) for Gaganyaan

questions.fact: ISRO released the Indian Space Situational Awareness Report for 2025 in April 2026.
questions.question: According to ISSAR-2025, which ISRO entity functions as the nodal body for space sustainability and SSA activities?
questions.explanation: The report says ISRO System for Safe and Sustainable Space Operations Management, or IS4OM, is the nodal entity coordinating space sustainability and SSA work.

source.title: Indian Space Situational Awareness Report for 2025 Released

questions.fact: ISRO signed an MoU on 20 April 2026 for scientific collaboration in space science, technology and exploration.
questions.question: ISRO signed an MoU on 20 April 2026 with which institution for collaboration in space science and related technologies?
questions.explanation: ISRO announced an MoU with the Tata Institute of Fundamental Research for collaboration in space science, technology and exploration.

source.title: ISRO and TIFR Sign MoU for Collaboration in Space Science and Related Technologies

questions.fact: India secured its first-ever EGMO gold medal and best-ever team rank in 2026.
questions.question: The 15th European Girls' Mathematical Olympiad 2026 was held in Bordeaux. Bordeaux is in which country?
questions.explanation: The PIB release said EGMO 2026 was held in Bordeaux, France, from 9 April to 15 April 2026.

source.title: Indian Team Achieves Historic Success at the 15th European Girls' Mathematical Olympiad 2026

questions.fact: India delivered its best-ever team performance at EGMO 2026.
questions.question: What was India's best-ever team rank at EGMO 2026?
questions.explanation: PIB reported that India secured 6th position out of 67 participating countries, its highest rank since debuting in 2015.

source.title: Indian Team Achieves Historic Success at the 15th European Girls' Mathematical Olympiad 2026

questions.fact: MeitY constituted the AI Governance and Economic Group in April 2026.
questions.question: Which ministry constituted the AI Governance and Economic Group (AIGEG)?
options: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
questions.correct_answer: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
questions.explanation: The official release says MeitY constituted AIGEG as the central institutional mechanism for AI governance policy development and coordination.

source.title: Government Constitutes AI Governance and Economic Group (AIGEG) to Lead India's National AI Governance Strategy

questions.fact: TPEC was created as a standing expert advisory body for India's AI governance architecture.
questions.question: The Technology and Policy Expert Committee (TPEC) was set up to provide expert support to which body?
options: Digital Personal Data Board of India
questions.explanation: MeitY said TPEC will provide the technical, legal and policy advice needed to support the functioning of AIGEG.

source.title: Government Constitutes Technology and Policy Expert Committee (TPEC) to Provide Expert Advisory Support to India's AI Governance Architecture

questions.fact: Startup India Fund of Funds 2.0 was notified in April 2026.
questions.question: What is the total corpus of Startup India Fund of Funds 2.0?
questions.explanation: The Commerce Ministry said Startup India FoF 2.0 has a total corpus of Rs. 10,000 crore for commitments to eligible AIFs.

source.title: Government notifies Startup India Fund of Funds 2.0 with Rs. 10,000 crore corpus to mobilize capital for startups

questions.fact: e-SafeHER is a cyber security awareness programme for women in rural India.
questions.question: e-SafeHER aims to enable how many Cyber Sakhis across rural India over the next three years?
questions.explanation: The MeitY release says e-SafeHER aims to enable one million Cyber Sakhis across rural India over three years.

source.title: e-SafeHER - a Cyber Security Awareness Training Programme to enable one million Cyber Sakhis across rural India

questions.fact: e-SafeHER is anchored under MeitY's ISEA programme through C-DAC Hyderabad.
questions.question: e-SafeHER will be jointly delivered by C-DAC Hyderabad and which organisation?
questions.explanation: The official note says the programme will be jointly delivered by C-DAC Hyderabad and Reliance Foundation.

source.title: e-SafeHER - a Cyber Security Awareness Training Programme to enable one million Cyber Sakhis across rural India

questions.fact: The Labour Ministry signed MoUs with Porter and Gigin Technologies on 13 April 2026.
questions.question: The Labour Ministry signed MoUs with Porter and Gigin Technologies to strengthen employment linkages through which portal?
questions.explanation: The PIB release says the MoUs were signed to expand employment opportunities and strengthen digital job matching through the NCS portal.

source.title: Ministry of Labour and Employment signs MoUs with Porter and Gigin Technologies to strengthen employment linkages through National Career Service Portal

questions.fact: UIDAI partnered with MapmyIndia to help residents locate authorised Aadhaar Centres.
questions.question: UIDAI partnered with MapmyIndia to display authorised Aadhaar Centres on which app?
questions.explanation: UIDAI said the agreement with MapmyIndia will enable display of authorised Aadhaar Centres on the Mappls App.

source.title: UIDAI ties up with MapmyIndia to display authorised Aadhaar Centres in Mappls App

questions.fact: A dedicated mobile app was launched in April 2026 to support the clinical workflow of Community Health Officers.
questions.question: The Clinical Workflow App launched for Community Health Officers was developed by which institution?
questions.explanation: The Health Ministry release says ICMR developed the clinical decision-support mobile app for CHOs.

source.title: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare Launches Mobile Application to Strengthen Clinical Workflow of Community Health Officers

questions.fact: AB PM-JAY Auto-Adjudication Hackathon 2026 was launched to build scalable digital claims solutions.
questions.question: The grand finale of the AB PM-JAY Auto-Adjudication Hackathon 2026 is scheduled to be held at:
options: National Institute of Health and Family Welfare
questions.explanation: The National Health Authority said the two-day offline finale will be held on 8-9 May 2026 at IISc Bengaluru.

source.title: National Health Authority Invites Innovators to Join AB PM-JAY Auto-Adjudication Hackathon 2026

questions.fact: The inaugural Khelo India Tribal Games 2026 became India's first national multi-sport event dedicated exclusively to tribal athletes.
questions.question: The inaugural Khelo India Tribal Games 2026 were held in which state?
questions.explanation: PIB said the inaugural Khelo India Tribal Games were held in Chhattisgarh across Raipur, Jagdalpur and Sarguja.

source.title: Khelo India Tribal Games - A New Chapter in Tribal Sports

questions.fact: Khelo India Tribal Games 2026 featured seven medal sports and two demonstration sports.
questions.question: Khelo India Tribal Games 2026 included mallakhamb as a demonstration sport. What was the other demonstration sport?
questions.explanation: The PIB note on Khelo India Tribal Games lists mallakhamb and kabaddi as the two demonstration sports.

source.title: Khelo India Tribal Games - A New Chapter in Tribal Sports

questions.fact: India signed an MoU on 20 April 2026 to deepen MSME cooperation with an East Asian partner.
questions.question: India signed an MoU on 20 April 2026 to strengthen MSME cooperation with which country?
questions.explanation: PIB reported that India's MSME Ministry signed an MoU with the Republic of Korea's Ministry of SMEs and Startups on 20 April 2026.

source.title: India and Republic of Korea Sign MoU to Strengthen Cooperation in MSME Sector

questions.fact: India hosted the 7th Joint Group of Customs meeting in Munnar, Kerala, on 20-21 April 2026.
questions.question: The 7th Joint Group of Customs meeting held on 20-21 April 2026 was between India and:
questions.explanation: The Finance Ministry release states that the 7th Joint Group of Customs meeting was held between India and Bhutan in Munnar, Kerala.

source.title: India and Bhutan hold 7th Joint Group of Customs meeting in Munnar, Kerala, on 20th-21st April 2026

questions.fact: The first phase of Census-2027 began on 1 April 2026.
questions.question: The first phase of Census-2027 that began on 1 April 2026 is called:
questions.explanation: The PIB Dehradun release said the first phase of Census-2027 is the House-listing and Housing Census, or HLO, and it began on 1 April 2026.

source.title: First phase of Census-2027 begins in Uttarakhand
